title: Doc, Hands of Steel
writer: Alfonso Balcázar, Miguel Cussó, Giovanni Simonelli
actors: Carl Möhner, Luis Dávila, Fernando Sancho
plot: While being pursued by a bounty hunter, Doc, a gambler, accidentally sees bandits killing a sheriff. Doc pretends to be the sheriff so the bounty hunter will stop his chase. The bandits however still believe the sheriff is alive.
